SEARCH

Class Venue

java.lang.Object
Venue
Direct Known Subclasses:
Arena, Auditorium, OpenAir, Stadium
public abstract class Venue extends Object
CS 3331 – Advanced Object-Oriented Programming Project Part 1 – TicketMiner Abstract class representing a venue where events take place. A venue has a capacity, cost, and VIP seating percentage.
